task: Write a Python function that parses an AWS S3 object key and extracts the bucket name, folder path, and file name from a full S3 URI (e.g., 's3://my-bucket/path/to/file.txt')
Create a JSON CloudFormation template snippet that defines an AWS Lambda function resource with basic configuration including runtime, handler, and an IAM execution role
Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS IAM policy ARNs in the format 'arn:aws:iam::ACCOUNT-ID:policy/POLICY-NAME' and captures the account ID and policy name separately
